era: 1990-1998 (reunion 2017-present). Riot Grrrl. E=8 -- ferocious, politically charged, feminist, loud. Olympia.
associated_musicians: Joan Jett (produced 'Rebel Girl'; Runaways feminist punk lineage)
Calvin Johnson / K Records (Olympia scene peer)

theory_nodes.concept: RIOT GRRRL ENTERS ENGINE. Bikini Kill is the most important feminist punk band in history. Kathleen Hanna, Tobi Vail, Kathi Wilcox, Billy Karren. Olympia 1990-1998. One of the key cultural forces of Third Wave feminism.
theory_nodes.description: Riot grrrl enters the engine at degree 276. The movement that changed feminist representation in punk music.

theory_nodes.concept: Kathleen Hanna: vocal approach (screaming-singing-speaking-chanting), girls to the front policy, body writing practice, riot grrrl manifesto author, Cobain/Teen Spirit connection, Le Tigre, The Julie Ruin.
theory_nodes.description: Kathleen Hanna as vocalist, activist, and theorist.

theory_nodes.concept: Tobi Vail: drumming, 'Jigsaw' zine, K Records/Evergreen connection, intellectual architect of riot grrrl. Vail-Cobain relationship and influence on Nirvana songwriting documented.
theory_nodes.description: Tobi Vail as drummer, theorist, and K Records bridge.

theory_nodes.concept: Kill Rock Stars enters engine. Founded Olympia 1991 by Slim Moon. Peer to K Records. Two Olympia labels in two degrees: K Records (275), Kill Rock Stars (276). Olympia institutional infrastructure documented.
theory_nodes.description: Kill Rock Stars enters at degree 276. Riot grrrl's commercial infrastructure.

theory_nodes.concept: 'Rebel Girl' (1993): the anthem. Joan Jett production. Runaways (1975) to Bikini Kill (1993): feminist punk lineage in the production credits. The song's cultural life is continuous and growing.
theory_nodes.description: Rebel Girl as defining riot grrrl text in song form.

theory_nodes.concept: Zine culture: 'Bikini Kill' (Hanna), 'Jigsaw' (Vail), girl zine network. Hand-assembled, photocopied, mailed. Original social network: personal, physical, intentional. Anticipated Internet personal publishing.
theory_nodes.description: Riot grrrl zine culture as precursor to personal publishing revolution.

theory_nodes.concept: Olympia chapter complete: Beat Happening (275, K Records, E=5) + Bikini Kill (276, Kill Rock Stars, E=8). Same city, same Evergreen world, same DIY values. E=5 to E=8. Tobi Vail connects both.
theory_nodes.description: Olympia's two engine degrees document the full spectrum of the scene.

cross_references.relationship: Olympia second entry (Beat Happening first). K Records / Kill Rock Stars peer institutions. Tobi Vail connects K Records scene to Bikini Kill. IPU Convention (Aug 1991) as riot grrrl precursor documented at 275.
Produced 'Rebel Girl.' Runaways (1975-1979) to Bikini Kill (1993): feminist punk lineage. The production credits document the tradition.
DC-Olympia connection. Bikini Kill played with Fugazi. DC political hardcore + Olympia feminist punk = riot grrrl's full geographic profile.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=8. Combined E=16. ORCA ARC CLOSES. 224 dB biosonar click trains paired with riot grrrl at maximum energy. Both are maximum intensity in their respective registers.
